reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
La chica que atiende en la cafetería tiene muy mal humor. Le puso el televisor a todo lo que da y se negó a atenderme. No volveremos por ahí. Claramente no somos bienvenidos claramente porque quisimos ir a trabajar una sola con la computadora eso molesto.

(Translated by Google)
The girl who works at the cafeteria is in a terrible mood. She blasted the TV and refused to serve me. We won't be going back there. We're clearly not welcome, especially since we wanted to work alone with our laptops, which was annoying.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4OWRxTTd3RRAB
